content.text:
what is this warning ? :  Warning: 💡 pi-cache-optimizer: nyro/deepseek-v4-flash-2 is DeepSeek-like but merged compat lacks requiresReasoningContentOnAssistantMessages and thinkingFormat.                    
 Proxies may reduce or hide cache hits. Edit ~/.pi/agent/models.json -> providers["nyro"] -> compat (at the same level as baseUrl/api/apiKey/models).                                 
                                                                                                                                                                                      
 Recommended DeepSeek compat snippet:                                                                                                                                                 
 {                                                                                                                                                                                    
   "requiresReasoningContentOnAssistantMessages": true,                                                                                                                               
   "thinkingFormat": "deepseek"                                                                                                                                                       
 }                                                                                                                                                                                    
 - requiresReasoningContentOnAssistantMessages: true keeps replayed assistant turns compatible with DeepSeek reasoning_content requirements.                                          
 - thinkingFormat: "deepseek" tells Pi to use DeepSeek reasoning/thinking parameter format.                                                                                           
                                                                                                                                                                                      
 If this channel has no models.json provider entry yet:                                                                                                                               
 - Keep existing authentication as-is; do not copy credentials, tokens, or API keys.                                                                                                  
 - Add only cache/routing compat overrides in ~/.pi/agent/models.json.                                                                                                                
 Provider-level minimal override:                                                                                                                                                     
 {                                                                                                                                                                                    
   "providers": {                                                                                                                                                                     
     "nyro": {                                                                                                                                                                        
       "compat": {                                                                                                                                                                    
         "requiresReasoningContentOnAssistantMessages": true,                                                                                                                         
         "thinkingFormat": "deepseek"                                                                                                                                                 
       }                                                                                                                                                                              
     }                                                                                                                                                                                
   }                                                                                                                                                                                  
 }                                                                                                                                                                                    
 Single-model override (use this if only this model should change):                                                                                                                   
 {                                                                                                                                                                                    
   "providers": {                                                                                                                                                                     
     "nyro": {                                                                                                                                                                        
       "modelOverrides": {                                                                                                                                                            
         "deepseek-v4-flash-2": {                                                                                                                                                     
           "compat": {                                                                                                                                                                
             "requiresReasoningContentOnAssistantMessages": true,                                                                                                                     
             "thinkingFormat": "deepseek"                                                                                                                                             
           }                                                                                                                                                                          
         }                                                                                                                                                                            
       }                                                                                                                                                                              
     }                                                                                                                                                                                
   }                                                                                                                                                                                  
 }

message.errorMessage: 400 Error from provider (DeepSeek): Failed to deserialize the JSON body into the target type: messages[0].role: unknown variant `developer`, expected one of `system`, `user`, `assistant`, `tool`, `latest_reminder` at line 1 column 9441
